'''THX Ultrasound Speakers''' were a type of [[Speaker/Legends|speaker]].<ref name="Queenie" /> In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places ''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].</ref> [[1138 (easter egg)|1138]] of them played [[Music/Legends|music]] throughout an [[amusement park]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] called [[Hologram Fun World]], located in the [[Zabian system/Legends|Zabian system]].<ref name="Queenie" />

==Behind the scenes==
THX Ultrasound Speakers were mentioned in the fifth novel of the [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince|''Jedi Prince'']] young readers series, ''[[Queen of the Empire]]'', published in [[1993]].<ref name="Queenie" /> Allusions to [[George Lucas]]'s first feature film, [[Wikipedia:THX 1138|''THX 1138'']], are made often throughout ''[[Star Wars]]'' material, and these homages have been officially acknowledged.<ref name="THX">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/release/video/f20040909/index.html|text=Looking for THX 1138 in a Galaxy Far, Far Away…}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' {{1stm}}
